name: spark-frost
description: A Spark L2 wallet with FROST threshold signatures

scripts.types: yarn workspace @buildonspark/spark-sdk types && yarn workspace @buildonspark/nodejs-scripts types && yarn workspace spark-frost-dkg types
scripts.test: yarn workspace @buildonspark/spark-sdk test-cmd src/tests/threshold-signer.test.ts && yarn workspace spark-frost-dkg test
scripts.dkg:demo: yarn workspace spark-frost-dkg ceremony walkthrough --threshold 2 --participants 3 --out output/demo-transfer --kind transfer --amount 1000
scripts.dkg:demo:lightning: yarn workspace spark-frost-dkg ceremony walkthrough --threshold 2 --participants 3 --out output/demo-lightning --kind lightning --amount 100
